controlsConfirmed.evidence: The desktop hosted-QR UI receives qrImage/status/displayName/account metadata only. It does not request or render imei/cookie/userAgent credential values.
cloud_verify_magic_link and cloud_register_device save the returned SaaS device token into the OS keychain and return the non-secret __keychain__ sentinel to the webview.
Cloud account deletion is a device-token authorized DELETE request to /api/v1/accounts/:account_id; local logout_account remains isolated to local mode.
The cloud QR poll interval is cleared on terminal states and component destroy to avoid stale polling with a bearer token.

summary: Security review pass for the completed desktop wiring. Zalo credential plaintext does not enter the webview, and persisted SaaS device tokens now live in OS keychain instead of localStorage.
